mapper.select: select q.id, q.content, q.image, q.analysis, q.qu_type, q.repo_id, q.course_id as courseId, c.name as courseName, q.chapter_id as chapterId, cc.title as chapterTitle, q.knowledge_point_id as knowledgePointId, kp.name as knowledgePointName, q.difficulty, r.title as repoTitle from t_question as q join t_repo as r on q.repo_id = r.id left join t_course as c on q.course_id = c.id left join t_course_chapter as cc on q.chapter_id = cc.id left join t_knowledge_point as kp on q.knowledge_point_id = kp.id where q.id = #{id}

select q.id, q.content, q.image, q.repo_id, q.qu_type, q.course_id as courseId, c.name as courseName, q.chapter_id as chapterId, cc.title as chapterTitle, q.knowledge_point_id as knowledgePointId, kp.name as knowledgePointName, q.difficulty, r.title as repoTitle from t_question as q join t_repo as r on q.repo_id = r.id left join t_course as c on q.course_id = c.id left join t_course_chapter as cc on q.chapter_id = cc.id left join t_knowledge_point as kp on q.knowledge_point_id = kp.id where q.id = #{id}
